business: The Financial Information System for California (FI$Cal)

lead.business: The Financial Information System for California (FI$Cal)
lead.description: The Department of FISCal (FI$Cal) operates California’s integrated budgeting, procurement, cash management, and accounting system. The FI$Cal system modernized how the state of California manages its finances and is one of the largest and most dynamic IT and business-transformation undertakings in California’s history. It eliminates the need for hundreds of independent legacy systems by combining the state’s financial management into a single system. To learn more about FI$Cal, visit our website.
